message:
Prevent memory exhaustion from large stdin/file inputs

Add early termination and bounded reads to prevent DoS attacks:

render.ts (stdin handling):
- Track accumulated bytes while reading stdin chunks
- Terminate reading once we have enough data (maxContext + 1KB buffer)
- Previously read entire stdin into memory before truncating, which
  could exhaust memory with: `yes | jfp render prompt-id --stdin`

variables.ts (file variable handling):
- Use openSync/readSync to read only MAX_FILE_VAR_SIZE bytes
- Previously readFileSync read entire file before truncating
- For a 100GB file, this would load 100GB into memory
- Now only allocates the bytes actually needed

Both fixes maintain the same truncation behavior for users while
preventing memory exhaustion attacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
